# Locked cryptographic contract with RFC citations and test vectors

## Problem

Cryptographic protocols drift when the implementation is the spec.

## Solution

Locked contract sections + RFC/NIST citation per primitive + minimal library boundary + cross-implementation test vectors generated by an independent reference in a different language.

## When to use

Any cross-implementation cryptographic protocol; any contract where byte-equality matters.

## When NOT to use

Internal-only crypto with one implementation; prototypes.
